notes: REF-B is the pre-registered no-world-model reference: no imagination (D2/D3 N/A), no grounded rollout — its native trajectory is the BC waypoint head

d1_decode_ade_0_2s.note: frozen-probe parity metric (identical code path); lower is better

d2_direction_acc.note: imagination usable for selection; higher is better (REF-B N/A)

verdict.DOCTRINE: D1-D3 + open-loop grounded ADE are NECESSARY, not sufficient (arXiv 2512.24497). This verdict decides the decode/open-loop conditions ONLY; the closed-loop gates D4-D6 (interactive success, blocked-route, simple->complex slope) remain the arbiters of the hierarchy edge and are computed in sim, not here.
